evaluator: fresh independent Level 2 evaluator (Copilot CLI Chief)

criteria.name: pure_deterministic_offline_function
criteria.acceptance_criterion: classify() is a pure deterministic function (no I/O, no network, no LLM) importable offline; identical inputs always yield an identical ClassificationResult.
evidence: Read apps/api/app/classify/engine.py: classify(facts, *, as_of=None) consumes only OfferFacts/date and returns a frozen ClassificationResult; no file, network, LLM, or database I/O imports/calls are present.
Independent adversarial probe PASS: determinism_equal_results returned True for repeated calls with identical OfferFacts/as_of.
Independent immutability probes PASS: assigning to ClassificationResult.zero_cost_class and OfferFacts.requires_card raised FrozenInstanceError.

criteria.name: billing_gates_z1
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Billing gates: requires_card True, has_paid_dependencies True, or any quota whose exhaustion_behaviour is automatic_billing is classified Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE and NEVER Z0, with the specific gate named in blocking_conditions.
evidence: Read engine.py gate 2: requires_card True, has_paid_dependencies True, or BILLING_EXHAUSTION automatic_billing returns Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE with the billing reasons copied to blocking_conditions.
Independent adversarial checks PASS: requires_card_dominates_z0 -> Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE; paid_dependencies_is_z1 -> Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE; automatic_billing_quota_is_z1 -> Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE.

Precedence check PASS: z1_billing_dominates_unknowns returned Z1_BILLING_EXPOSURE for trial + requires_card=True + unknown paid-deps/exhaustion, confirming a known billing exposure still dominates unknowns.

criteria.name: unknown_material_conditions_unknown
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Safety rule: any material condition that is unknown (requires_card None, has_paid_dependencies None, an exhaustion_behaviour of unknown, or total absence of quota data) yields UNKNOWN and NEVER Z0.
evidence: Read engine.py: UNKNOWN is now gate 3 before Z2; unknown card, unknown paid dependencies, no quota data, unknown exhaustion, and unrecognised exhaustion return UNKNOWN.

Independent required regression probes PASS: trial_with_unknown_card -> UNKNOWN; trial_with_no_quota_data -> UNKNOWN; bounded_until_with_unknown_paid_deps -> UNKNOWN; manual_upgrade_with_unknown_card -> UNKNOWN.

Additional adversarial probes PASS: credit_with_unknown_exhaustion -> UNKNOWN; student_program with unrecognised exhaustion -> UNKNOWN; broad invariant grid over always_free/trial/new_customer_credit, unknown booleans, no/unknown/unrecognised/manual-upgrade behaviours, and bounded windows reported invariant_grid_unknown_material PASS.

criteria.name: z0_rule_clear_gates_safe_exhaustion
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Z0_TRUE_FREE is returned only when all billing gates are explicitly clear and every quota exhaustion behaviour is a safe stop-type; blocking_conditions is empty and reasons explain why it is $0.
evidence: Read engine.py gate 5: Z0 is reached only after Z3, Z1, UNKNOWN, and Z2 do not return; reasons include no card, no paid dependencies, safe stop behaviours, and classified Z0_TRUE_FREE.
Independent adversarial check clean_true_free PASS: always_free with requires_card=False, has_paid_dependencies=False, hard_stop/read_only returned Z0_TRUE_FREE.
Unit truth-table parametrization covers all nine SAFE_EXHAUSTION values across always_free, recurring_quota, personal_use_free, and other; targeted classifier pytest passed 75 tests.

criteria.name: z2_rule_temporary_conditional
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Trial, new_customer_credit, bounded/expired availability windows, and eligibility-conditional program offer types are classified Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL (assuming no dominating billing exposure).
evidence: Read engine.py gate 4: TEMPORARY_CONDITIONAL_OFFER_TYPES, available_until windows, and manual_upgrade_required quotas return Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL only after all material conditions are known.

Independent adversarial checks PASS: trial_is_z2_when_known, credit_is_z2_when_known, bounded_available_until_is_z2_when_known, and manual_upgrade_is_z2_when_known all returned Z2_TEMPORARY_OR_CONDITIONAL.

tests/unit/test_z0_classifier.py covers startup/student/open-source/hackathon offer types, expired availability, manual_upgrade_required, and the new UNKNOWN-dominates-Z2 cases; targeted pytest passed 75 tests.

criteria.name: z3_rule_self_hosted
evidence: Read engine.py gate 1: self_hosted_open_source returns Z3_SELF_HOSTED_BUILDING_BLOCK before billing, UNKNOWN, Z2, and Z0 gates.
Independent adversarial check self_hosted_is_z3 PASS: self_hosted_open_source with otherwise billing-like quota facts returned Z3_SELF_HOSTED_BUILDING_BLOCK, matching documented precedence.

criteria.name: explainable_result_contract
criteria.acceptance_criterion: Every ClassificationResult includes an ordered, human-readable reasons list; every non-Z0 result names at least one blocking or downgrading condition.
evidence: Read engine.py: each return path supplies tuple reasons; Z3/Z1/UNKNOWN/Z2 non-Z0 paths also supply blocking_conditions from the deciding reasons.
Unit truth-table assertions check non-empty reasons/blocking conditions for representative paths; targeted classifier pytest passed 75 tests.
Independent adversarial printed paths confirmed Z1, UNKNOWN, Z2, and Z3 classifications include class-specific blocking_conditions; Z0 returns an empty tuple.

criteria.name: orm_adapter_read_only_latest_version
criteria.acceptance_criterion: classify_offer(orm_offer) reads an Offer plus its Quota rows and returns the same result the pure function would for those facts, performing no writes.
evidence: Read apps/api/app/classify/orm.py: _select_version chooses max(offer.versions, key=version_number); offer_facts_from_orm reads selected.quotas exhaustion_behaviour plus offer material fields; classify_offer delegates to classify. No add/flush/commit/delete/execute calls exist.

Independent transient ORM probe PASS: Offer/OfferVersion/Quota instances remained sessionless; classify_offer selected version_number=2 and returned Z0; explicit v1 returned Z1 for automatic_billing; offer_facts_from_orm returned latest quota tuple (hard_stop); sa_inspect(offer).session stayed None after classification.

criteria.name: truth_table_suite_comprehensive
criteria.acceptance_criterion: A comprehensive truth-table unit suite covers each gate, each exhaustion behaviour, missing/contradictory/boundary data, and the no-Z0-on-unknown rule, and all tests pass offline.
evidence: Targeted command `.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests\unit\test_z0_classifier.py -q` exited 0 with 75 passed in 0.99s.

Read tests/unit/test_z0_classifier.py: suite covers Z0 safe behaviours, Z1 card/paid-dep/automatic-billing/contradictory cases, Z2 known temporary/conditional/window/manual-upgrade cases, Z3, UNKNOWN no-card/no-paid-dep/no-quota/unknown/unrecognised exhaustion, determinism, immutability, helper summarise, and ORM adapter.

New regression tests are present for the previous blocking issue: test_unknown_dominates_trial_with_unknown_card, test_unknown_dominates_trial_with_no_quota_data, test_unknown_dominates_bounded_window_with_unknown_paid_deps, and test_unknown_dominates_manual_upgrade_with_unknown_card.

Vocabulary drift guards exist: known_zero_cost_classes() == ZERO_COST_CLASSES, exhaustion partitions tile EXHAUSTION_BEHAVIOURS, and referenced offer types are in OFFER_TYPES. Engine imports OFFER_TYPES and EXHAUSTION_BEHAVIOURS from app.models.vocab; zero-cost label constants are guarded against app.models.vocab.ZERO_COST_CLASSES drift by the unit suite.

scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit exited 0: Ruff lint PASS; Ruff format check PASS (37 files); Pytest 147 passed/10 skipped in 1.76s; Prettier PASS; ESLint PASS; Secret scan PASS; pip-audit PASS (No known vulnerabilities found); npm audit PASS (0 vulnerabilities); ALL CHECKS PASSED.

criteria.name: product_truth_no_unsupported_claims
criteria.acceptance_criterion: No unsupported free-tier/zero-cost/Z0 product claim is introduced; the engine only classifies supplied facts and defaults to UNKNOWN rather than guessing; no real-service free claim is added.
evidence: Changed files in slice vs origin/main: agent-state/current_contract.json, agent-state/evaluation.json, agent-state/progress.md, apps/api/app/classify/{__init__,engine,orm}.py, docs/DATA_MODEL.md, tests/unit/test_z0_classifier.py.

Product-truth scan over added lines found free/Z0/$0 terminology only in classifier/docs/tests/contracts and no real named-provider/service assertion. Provider-name added-line scan for AWS/Azure/Google/Oracle/Cloudflare/Vercel/GitHub returned PROVIDER_NAME_MATCH_COUNT=0.
No offer data, provider fixture, or catalogue record asserting a real service is free/Z0 was added.
